description: You need to build a Docker image for a Python application that depends on a proprietary library hosted on a private artifact server at 'http://host.docker.internal:8090/proprietary_lib.tar.gz'. The server requires an authentication header 'X-Auth-Token' matching the content of 'auth_token.txt' provided in the build context at '/home/ga/secure-build/'. Update the Dockerfile and build the image tagged as 'secure-app:latest', ensuring the library file is present at '/app/proprietary_lib.tar.gz' in the final image. You must use Docker BuildKit secrets to handle the token so that it does not appear in the final image history, environment variables, or metadata.
